planner_notes: Sketch plan (mental model) for the REAL end-to-end TTNN pipeline. Source A = HF hub (config, tokenizer, AutoModelForCausalLM reference + model.generate golden). Source B = bring-up tool output (_stubs graduated bodies, _captured goldens, tests/pcc). This is a SINGLE task head: causal text generation (NemotronHForCausalLM). Bring-up is single-phase TP=2: the five Phase-2 shard stubs carry a .last_good_sharded body (ShardTensorToMesh + all_reduce over the TP axis); the two native-only stubs run replicated (full exact math). Chip placement = 4-chip MeshShape(2,2), rows=DP=2, cols=TP=2, FABRIC_1D.

graduated_modules_source_b.name: nemotron_h_model
graduated_modules_source_b.role: monolith backbone: embedding, 52-layer residual scaffold, fp32 pre/final RMSNorm, attention helper (REUSE), and the expert-parallel MoE. Drives the whole forward in both compose modes.

graduated_modules_source_b.name: nemotron_h_block
graduated_modules_source_b.role: one full Mamba2 M-layer (own pre-norm + residual + row-parallel out-proj all_reduce). Routed for the FIRST mamba layer so the block stub runs on real data.

graduated_modules_source_b.name: nemotron_h_mamba2_mixer
graduated_modules_source_b.role: Mamba2 SSD mixer for the remaining M-layers; row-parallel in-proj shard -> partial -> all_reduce.

graduated_modules_source_b.name: mamba_r_m_s_norm_gated
graduated_modules_source_b.role: gated grouped RMSNorm inside every Mamba2 mixer; invoked transitively whenever a mamba mixer runs.

graduated_modules_source_b.name: nemotron_h_m_o_e
graduated_modules_source_b.role: MoE E-layer: expert-parallel disjoint expert slice per TP chip -> local weighted mixture -> all_reduce -> add replicated shared expert.

graduated_modules_source_b.name: nemotron_h_topk_router
graduated_modules_source_b.role: replicated top-k router (sigmoid + e_score_correction_bias + per-row-max recenter + exact top-k one-hot); invoked transitively inside the MoE mixer.

graduated_modules_source_b.name: re_l_u_squared_activation
graduated_modules_source_b.role: relu^2 expert activation; invoked transitively inside every MoE expert.

task_heads.name: causal_text_generation
task_heads.input: HF AutoTokenizer(prompt='The capital of France is') -> input_ids (1,5), from _captured/_e2e_golden/input_ids.pt (== live tokenizer output).
task_heads.output: generated next-token ids + per-step next-token logits; decoded text.
task_heads.reference_golden: _captured/_e2e_golden/{input_ids,golden_new_ids,golden_step_logits}.pt captured from AutoModelForCausalLM.generate(max_new_tokens=N). golden_new_ids=[6993,2613,3501,7185,34315] -> " Paris.\" No extra punct". BOTH sides capped to the SAME N (default 5).
chained_stubs_in_order: nemotron_h_model._apply_embeddings (token ids -> replicated fp32 residual stream)
per layer i in 0..51 (nemotron_h_model._g_norm_f32 pre-RMSNorm, replicated):
i == first MAMBA layer (0) -> nemotron_h_block (own norm+residual)
i in ATTN_LAYERS (5,12,19,26,33,42) -> nemotron_h_model._attn (REUSE, not graduated)
nemotron_h_model._g_norm_f_f32 final RMSNorm -> lm_head linear -> last-position logits
task_heads.no_reference_injection_at_joints: each layer is fed the PREVIOUS TT layer's real residual output; only the token ids (Source A/B) enter at the front and logits leave at the back.

pass_definition.gate_1: every routed graduated stub is still real ttnn (no torch runtime fallback; _runtime_fallbacks.json empty). A sharded TP=2 body counts as native.
pass_definition.gate_2: every one of the 7 graduated modules is actually invoked in the compose run (recorded in tt._invocation registry).
pass_definition.gate_3: mean per-step next-token-logits PCC vs HF golden >= 0.95, AND first-N token ids match the golden.
pass_definition.shard_requirement: final pipeline MUST contain ShardTensorToMesh (ShardTensor2dMesh) + a collective (all_reduce over the TP/cluster axis); a pure-replication pipeline is NOT acceptable.

task_heads.validation_metric: models.common.utility_functions.comp_pcc over fp32 logits, per step; report mean_pcc.
task_heads.behavioral_proof: TT greedy decode of 'The capital of France is' reproduces the golden ids [6993,2613,3501,7185,34315] i.e. ' Paris." No extra punct' (token_match == True).
self_validation_plan: print e2e PCC on its own line before every assert (pass or fail).
assert Gate1 (no fallbacks), Gate2 (no missing graduated modules), Gate3 (mean_pcc>=0.95 + token_match).
print the discovered mesh shape and shard_active flag so the TP=2 placement is visible in the log.
fast proxy test_e2e_prefill (one prefill, first-token PCC) + full test_e2e_generate (capped decode).

chip_placement.fabric: ttnn.FabricConfig.FABRIC_1D set BEFORE open_mesh_device; topology auto-discovered (no TT_MESH_GRAPH_DESC_PATH).
chip_placement.shard_activation: TT_HW_PLANNER_SHARD_RUN=1 + MeshDevice enables the graduated .last_good_sharded bodies (expert-parallel MoE shard on TP axis, all_reduce). Residual stream / embeddings / norms / lm_head replicated.
chip_placement.readback: outputs are replicated across all 4 chips; read back with ConcatMeshToTensor(dim=0) and take replica 0 -> numerically identical to the single-device golden.
chip_placement.single_device_fallback: if the mesh cannot be opened, fall back to one device (TP=1, everything replicated == native) and note it in the run output.

package_layout.tt/pipeline.py: the ONE shared chained forward (open_pipeline_mesh helper + NemotronHPipeline) imported by BOTH demo and test.
package_layout.demo/demo_text_generation.py: runnable `python -m ...demo.demo_text_generation` entrypoint: opens the mesh, runs the shared pipeline, prints generated text.
package_layout.tests/e2e/test_e2e_pipeline.py: opens the mesh, runs the shared pipeline, asserts Gate 1/2/3 vs the HF golden.
package_layout.README.md: what Call 1 does, how to run, PCC numbers.

orchestration: Exactly ONE task head (one Call) and all 7 graduated modules are shared by it, so a SINGLE build agent owns the whole pipeline (parallel fan-out would only create wiring drift on shared modules).
